candidate_sources_rejected: panic-only sources as complete GAD coverage
rejection_reasons: Patient pages are not clinician guidance.
Panic disorder does not cover every general-anxiety item.
Commercial tools were not authoritative guidance.
population_applicability: Partial: exact for adults with known or suspected GAD; not exact for children, every anxiety subtype, or all physical symptoms.
setting_applicability: Direct for primary, community, and specialist mental-health care; partial for UAE service pathways.
UAE_applicability: No exact UAE GAD guideline was identified; NICE recommendations require UAE clinician review, local crisis pathways, and local prescribing governance.
recency_verification: The current official NICE CG113 recommendations, last updated in 2020, were opened on 2026-07-12.
superseded_check: NICE CG113 remains the current official guideline for adult GAD and panic disorder.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped anxiety, worry, duration, distress, functional impairment, substance use, treatment history, education, and monitoring fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports anxiety and worry history, duration, distress, functional impairment, comorbid depression or anxiety, substance use, medical and treatment history, education, and active monitoring.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped clinician-documented counseling, medication, preference, questions, monitoring, and referral fields without autonomous treatment output.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-documented discussion of psychological or medication options, patient preference, treatment information, monitoring, and referral or relapse planning without autonomous treatment output.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped self-harm or suicide risk, severe functional impairment, substance misuse, support, specialist referral, safety discussion, and collaborative plan fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting severe functional impairment, self-harm or suicide risk, substance misuse, self-neglect, treatment history, home and community support, family impact, referral, and collaborative care planning.

unresolved_source_gaps: Restlessness, irritability, muscle tension, concentration, sleep, palpitations, breathlessness, avoidance, harm-to-others, psychosis, agitation, chest pain, syncope, detailed mental-state examination, GAD-7, PHQ-9, thyroid or blood testing, lifestyle advice, and fixed one-to-two-week review remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, risk status, and treatment remain clinician-stated.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
